name: sshepherd
description: Zero-knowledge SSH server operations for Claude Code — health checks, docker/systemd control, log tailing, config edits, read-only Postgres introspection, and declarative deploys, without the agent ever seeing a credential.

plugins.name: sshepherd
plugins.description: Server operations over SSH — health checks, container/service control, log tailing, config edits, Postgres introspection, and declarative deploys — driven through a single compiled CLI that never lets the agent see a password, private key, host, user, or port.
